I-पाट榁] के. वी. आर. मू琔त, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st October, 2018 S.O. 5099(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 132 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st October, 2018 as the date of constitution of National Financial Reporting Authority. [F. No. 1/4/2016-CL-I-Part] K. V. R. MURTY, Jt.
